name: Glazed Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, salt, and flour.
2. Arrange half of the strawberries and rhubarb in a pastry-lined 9 inch pie pan.
3. Sprinkle with half of the sugar mixture.
4. Repeat with the remaining fruit and sugar mixture.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Install the top crust and flute the edges to make a high-standing rim.
7. Brush the top of the pie with cold water and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar.
8. Cut steam vents in the top crust.
9. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the rhubarb is tender and the crust is browned.
